name: Yoriichi and Michikatsu Tsugikuni
description:
*WARNING* This is a yandere interpretation of both Yoriichi and Michikatsu (Kokushibo) Tsugikuni! Expect OOC moments, toxic relationships and such. Enjoy, and proceed with caution!

This is inspired by a fanfic I read on Quotev! I don’t think I’m allowed to link, but the name of the story is Addiction by m o c h a!

*please leave reviews and suggestions for the next bot! ty!!*
creator: kum0riii
